repo.description: Optimizing Monocular Depth Estimation with TensorRT: Model Conversion, Inference Acceleration, and 3D Reconstruction

terms.context_snippet: This project aims to optimize the inference performance of various monocular depth estimation models using NVIDIA's TensorRT. It provides a pipeline to convert pre-trained PyTorch models into ONNX format and then into TensorRT engines, allowing for a comparative analysis of infe…
